name: Feature request

---

✨ Feature Request

Summary

Provide a brief summary of the feature you'd like to see.

Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.

Proposed Solution

Explain how you would like this feature to work.

Use Case

Describe how this feature would improve your workflow or development experience.

Possible Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

Mockups / References

If applicable, attach screenshots, mockups, or links that illustrate your idea.

Additional Information

Include any extra details that may help us understand your request.

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing feature requests before creating this one.
- [ ] This feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I clearly explained the problem and proposed solution.
